name: acceptance_confirmation
subject: Confirmation of Agreement – {{company_name}}
body:
Dear {{recipient_name}},

We are delighted to confirm the acceptance of your agreement for:

Service: {{offer_details}}

Agreed Amount: BDT {{price}}

{% if deadline %}

Commencement Date: {{deadline}}

{% endif %}

Our team will proceed accordingly and keep you informed of all developments. Please do not hesitate to reach out should you require any clarification.

Thank you for choosing {{company_name}}. We look forward to a successful collaboration.

Yours sincerely,
{{sender_name}}
{{company_name}}
